description:
2025 Porsche Cayenne S, 4.0 TC V8, AWD, 468bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 569,000 or AED 8,914 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 6,083 KM - Porsche Warranty Until August 2030 (Extendable) - Porsche Service Contract Until August 2030 or 105,000 KMs (Ali & Sons) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Carrera White Metallic - Model Designation Painted in Black (High-Gloss) - Model Designation on Doors in Black - Pepita Interior including Pepita Luggage Set - Lightweight Sport Package - 22” GT Design Wheels - Adaptive Sports Seats in Front (18-Way Electric) - Exterior Mirrors Painted in Exterior Colour - Exclusive Design Fuel Filler Cap - Sports Exhaust System including Tailpipes in Silver - Brake Callipers Painted in Black (High-Gloss) - HD-Matrix LED Headlights - Seat Belts in Crayon - Porsche Crests on Headrests - Compass/Sport Chrono Stopwatch Instrument Dial in White - Door Sill Guards in Carbon Illuminated - Heads-Up Display - Bespoke Reversible Luggage Compartment Mat - Burmester 3D High-End Surround Sound System
